bookingId.title: Booking Id
bookingId.description: Id of the created Test Drive booking record. Pass this to Send Confirmation and Create Dealer Task.

confirmationMessage.title: Confirmation Message
confirmationMessage.description: Pre-formatted confirmation message — relay verbatim to the customer. On failure, contains the clarification prompt (e.g. 'I need a clearer time').

leadId.title: Lead Id
leadId.description: Id of the created Lead record.

success.title: Success
success.description: True if the booking was created. If false, read confirmationMessage — it explains what the customer needs to clarify.
